g.title: SelfImage
g.text: Chiralogy self-image (proof-level). Regenerated by `lake exe depgraph-proof`, do not edit.

The measured shape: the two kernel absences and the diagonal-argument taproot at the base; colour = character (blue apophatic, the larger hand; orange cataphatic; grey scaffolding; purple seam); the empty center peripheral; the register and filling instances a symmetric family.
